articles.title: Red Sox get good news on Roman Anthony, Garrett Crochet’s injuries
articles.description:
"It's a good day for me, getting positive news on both of them."

The post Red Sox get good news on Roman Anthony, Garrett Crochet’s injuries appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox report positive injury updates for Roman Anthony and Garrett Crochet.
Roman Anthony and Garrett Crochet are key players for Boston's 2023 season.
Improved health of these players boosts Red Sox's chances in upcoming games.

articles.title: Woman fired by Indiana university over Charlie Kirk post to receive $225,000 legal settlement
articles.description:
The woman's firing violated her constitutional rights because she was “speaking as a private citizen on a matter of public concern,” said Stevie Pactor, an ACLU attorney in Indiana.

The post Woman fired by Indiana university over Charlie Kirk post to receive $225,000 legal settlement appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Indiana university fires employee over social media post regarding Charlie Kirk.
Settlement of $225,000 awarded due to violation of constitutional rights.
ACLU attorney highlights implications for free speech protections affecting all citizens.
